## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences: what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New startup added to `data/companies.json`
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Docs / content update
- [ ] Other (describe above)

## Checklist

- [ ] If I edited `data/companies.json`, I ran `npm run validate:data` and it passes.
- [ ] If I changed Tailwind classes in `index.html` or `script.js`, I ran `npm run build:css` and committed the updated `public/tailwind.css`.
- [ ] I tested my change by opening `index.html` in a browser.
